### Revolut: Spend, Save, Trade {#review-app-1}

   **Bugs and stability.**
      3 recent review(s) mention bugs and stability.
      **Why it matters:** Users report reliability problems. This points to quality gaps competitors can exploit.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _Raza Hossain_, 1/5: "One of the worst customer support ever experienced, every time a new agent comes with the same repeated pitch however doesn't have the potential to resolve my issue. Three issues continue with no output, major glitch with the app."
            2. _kaeyas balls_, 4/5: "it has a few bugs here and there, mainly with adding money onto my account, but they hardly sour the experience tbh"

2. Trustworthy cross-device workflow: Google Wallet — 2 reviews. Focus: make login, backup, and sync predictable across devices.
